title: KamenRiderGavv
description: In Minecraft, Henshin can become Kamen Rider Gavv by eating snacks
body:
In the game, players can look for Dente to turn himself into Gavv, thus gaining the ability to transform and the ability to produce Gochizo. Gavv players can craft a wide variety of snacks to eat, resulting in the production of Gochizo. Henshin becomes a Kamen Rider by using Gochizo.

![gavv](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff59a334a916c3f0e332ab833e4964375784d918.png)![valen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1c9fb84033dd024dec8d76936d9214a812a1728.png)![vram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f19780a85093dc9d78e0f78e5f0691e1322a9463.png)![driver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87f20e5668ee0f8baf3c12f24e5a717e849793de.png)![Gochizo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31b166a7ff4af15a56fcb2b1815f099594d53841.png)![snacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87b58ac131d1669fc1eacb49fb8d1e0de871237d.png)![Raw materials for snacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57d5a7fc27b01c69fdeed506f6a402818399822f.png)
